rationale: Both evaluations award the same score (3/10) and reach identical substantive conclusions: strong software/performance background but complete absence of SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture, and AI accelerator expertise required for the Principal role. The differences are purely cosmetic rewording (e.g., '15+ years' vs '17+ years' framing, slightly different phrasing of the same concerns) and fall within ordinary run-to-run noise. Nothing in the variant references location, nationality, or any demographic signal tied to São Paulo vs Berlin.
